case_title: IMHOFF, ROBERT A. vs. YOUNGBLOOD, CLEMON et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: VEJNOSKA, L CHRISTOPHER SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR YOUNGBLOOD, JUANITA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNGBLOOD, CLEMON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNGBLOOD, CLEMON YOUNGBLOOD, JUANITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2911 16TH ST, #320 $1,944.56 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,944.56, STAYED UNTIL NOV-30-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EVICTION STAYED UNTIL AFTER 30-NOV-94; IF DEFT. COMPLIES WITH TERMS PLTF. WILL WAIVED ALL BACK RENTS AND DAMAGES; PLTF. WILL RETAIN $250.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
